sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Polestar Sets the Date for Reporting the Fourth Quarter Select and Full-Year 2025 Results – Company Announcement
feed.summary: Polestar (Nasdaq: PSNY) announced that it expects to publish its fourth-quarter select and full-year 2025 consolidated financial results on April 17, 2026, before market open. The company will host a conference call on the same day at 14:00 Central European Time (08:00 US Eastern Time) to discuss the results, which will be accessible via its Investor Relations website. Polestar, a Swedish electric performance car brand, also outlined its current model lineup, manufacturing diversification, and commitment to achieving climate neutrality by 2040.

feed.title: BJ's Wholesale Club Holdings EVP, Chief Growth Officer Sold Shares Worth Over $1.3M
feed.summary: Timothy Pierce, EVP and Chief Growth Officer at BJ's Wholesale Club Holdings, sold 14,872 shares of common stock in two separate transactions on April 10 and April 13, 2026. The sales generated aggregate proceeds of $1,365,175, at weighted average prices of $90.40 and $93.19 per share. Following these transactions, Pierce directly owns 38,780 common shares of the company.

feed.title: Northern Trust Corp. stock (US6658591044): Why its wealth management edge matters more now for U.S.
feed.summary: Northern Trust Corp. stands out with its fee-based model focused on high-net-worth individuals and institutional asset servicing, providing stability and predictable cash flows. The company leverages its heritage, global footprint, and technology investments to drive organic growth in specialized, high-margin segments like ultra-high-net-worth clients and sovereign wealth funds. This approach positions Northern Trust as a defensive play for investors seeking financial sector exposure without the typical banking volatility, especially given its focus on English-speaking markets and alignment with ESG integration and digital onboarding.

feed.title: Raymond James Initiates Research Coverage on John Marshall Bancorp
feed.summary: Raymond James & Associates has initiated equity research coverage on John Marshall Bancorp (JMSB), which is expected to enhance the company's visibility, transparency, and trading liquidity. This new coverage, stemming from Raymond James' extensive financial services equity team, provides investors with additional analytical insight into the regional banking group. The latest analyst rating on JMSB is a Buy with a $24.00 price target, while TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates JMSB as Neutral, citing improving financial performance and a solid balance sheet.

feed.title: Costco sued again over its rotisserie chicken
feed.summary: Costco is facing another class-action lawsuit concerning its $5 rotisserie chicken, this time over claims of salmonella risk. The lawsuit alleges contamination at Costco's poultry facility, Lincoln Premium Poultry, which reportedly received a low USDA rating for salmonella standards. Costco's attorneys are seeking dismissal, arguing that their rotisserie chicken is fully cooked, which kills salmonella, and that the plaintiff did not suffer any injury or purchase raw products.

feed.title: PPG Stock Pops On Preliminary Q1 Results, Global Price Increases
feed.summary: PPG Industries (NYSE: PPG) announced preliminary first-quarter results, exceeding analyst expectations with adjusted earnings of $1.83 per share against an estimated $1.71. The company also initiated global price increases of up to 20% across all product lines to manage rising costs and supply constraints. Following these announcements, PPG shares saw a 3.97% rise in after-hours trading.

feed.title: J.B. Hunt Transport Services (NASDAQ:JBHT) Releases Quarterly Earnings Results, Misses Estimates By $0.19 EPS
feed.summary: J.B. Hunt Transport Services (NASDAQ:JBHT) announced its quarterly earnings, reporting $1.49 EPS, missing the consensus estimate of $1.68 by $0.19. Following the announcement, the stock dipped 2.4% to $224.17. Despite the earnings miss, the company increased its quarterly dividend to $0.45 per share, resulting in a $1.80 annualized dividend.

feed.title: Riley Permian declares $0.40 quarterly dividend
feed.summary: Riley Exploration Permian, Inc. announced a $0.40 per share quarterly cash dividend, representing a 4.59% yield and marking the fifth consecutive year of dividend increases. The company also plans to release its first-quarter financial and operating results on May 6, 2026, followed by an investor conference call. This news follows recent reports of strong Q4 2025 EPS, a debt-reducing sale of midstream assets, and a $100 million share buyback program.

feed.title: Is Quantum Computing (QUBT) Using High-Profile Tech Showcases To Redefine Its Competitive Moat?
feed.summary: Quantum Computing Inc. (QCI) is leveraging recent high-profile presentations at tech showcases to elevate its profile and position its room temperature photonic quantum technology for real-world applications. While these events aim to attract government and industry buyers, the critical challenge remains converting pilot programs into recurring revenue, as costs continue to outpace sales. Investors need to consider QCI's growth forecasts against analyst cautions regarding underused capacity and slow customer adoption.

feed.title: JPMorganChase shareholders meet virtually May 19 at 10 a.m. ET
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE: JPM) will hold its 2026 annual meeting of shareholders virtually on May 19, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. ET. Shareholders can participate by visiting a dedicated virtual meeting website and using a 16-digit control number, and can submit questions both before and during the meeting. The general public can access a live audio webcast or listen via phone.

feed.title: JPMorganChase lists dividends for 8 preferred stock series
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE: JPM) has declared dividends on eight series of its preferred stock: DD, EE, GG, JJ, KK, LL, MM, and NN. The company, a leading financial services firm with worldwide operations, reported $4.9 trillion in assets and $364 billion in stockholders’ equity as of March 31, 2026. Further details are available on their Investor Relations website.

feed.title: Jury: Ticketmaster and Live Nation had anticompetitive monopoly
feed.summary: A Manhattan federal jury found that Live Nation and its Ticketmaster subsidiary held an anticompetitive monopoly over large concert venues. This verdict is a win for Colorado and several other states that continued the lawsuit after the Trump administration settled its claims. Colorado Attorney General Phil Weiser stated the decision is a pivotal moment for live events, holding Live Nation accountable for abusing its monopoly to inflate ticket prices and stifle competition.

feed.title: Arista Networks Inc. stock (US0404131064): Is its AI networking edge strong enough to unlock new ups
feed.summary: Arista Networks Inc. is positioned as a key beneficiary of the explosive growth in AI and hyperscale computing due to its specialized Ethernet switches that power massive data centers. The company's core business model, focused on high-performance, software-driven networking, delivers high gross margins and scales with data center expansion, particularly for hyperscalers like Microsoft and Meta. Analysts view Arista favorably, citing its leadership in AI-driven data center networking and strong execution, despite risks like customer concentration and intensifying competition.

feed.title: General Electric Co stock (US3696041033): Is aviation recovery strong enough to unlock new upside?
feed.summary: General Electric Co has transformed into a focused industrial entity, with aviation, power, and renewable energy at its core. The article examines whether the strong recovery in aviation demand, coupled with GE's refined business model and key product offerings like the LEAP engine, can drive sustained growth and unlock new upside for its stock. It also highlights GE's competitive advantages, strategic execution, and the positive views of analysts, while acknowledging potential risks such as supply chain issues and geopolitical tensions.

feed.title: Costco Wholesale Raises Quarterly Dividend to $1.47 per Share From $1.30, Payable May 15 to Holders of Record May 1
feed.summary: Costco Wholesale Corporation has announced an increase in its quarterly dividend to $1.47 per share, up from the previous $1.30 per share. This dividend will be payable on May 15 to shareholders of record as of May 1. The news was published on April 15, 2026, at 04:26 pm EDT by MT Newswires.

feed.title: Johnson Controls Said to Weigh $4.5 Billion in Divestitures
feed.summary: Johnson Controls International Plc is reportedly considering selling two businesses within its security division, Access Control and Intrusion Detection, which could collectively be valued at up to $4.5 billion. The company is working with financial advisers to gauge interest, with options including selling the units separately or to a single buyer.

feed.title: QuidelOrtho reports preliminary Q1 2026 revenue of $615-620 million
feed.summary: QuidelOrtho (NASDAQ: QDEL) announced preliminary unaudited revenue of $615-620 million for the first quarter of 2026, a figure impacted by a weaker respiratory season and slower international sales. Despite these macroeconomic challenges, the company's CEO, Brian J. Blaser, stated that the core business remains strong, and QuidelOrtho is taking cost actions to drive full-year performance. The company expects negative free cash flow for Q1 and H1 2026 but maintains its full-year positive free cash flow outlook.

feed.title: White House declines to opine on United-American merger idea
feed.summary: The White House has declined to comment on the idea of a merger between United Airlines and American Airlines. The article, by Bloomberg reporters Siddharth Philip and Jeff Mason, states that the Trump administration has not taken a stance on the potential airline consolidation.

feed.title: J.B. Hunt Transport gains after company initiatives help boost margins in FQ1 (JBHT:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: J.B. Hunt Transport Services (JBHT) saw its stock gain in postmarket trading after reporting fiscal first-quarter earnings that surpassed consensus estimates. The company's operating revenue increased by 5% year-over-year to $3.06 billion, and GAAP EPS of $1.49 exceeded estimates, rising from $1.17 in the prior year. These positive results are attributed to company initiatives that helped boost margins.

feed.title: Ross Stores, Inc. (NASDAQ:ROST) Sees Large Increase in Short Interest
feed.summary: Ross Stores, Inc. (NASDAQ:ROST) experienced a 34.0% increase in short interest in March, reaching 8,363,879 shares, which equates to 2.7% of its shares short sold and a short-interest ratio of 3.1 days. Despite recent insider selling by the COO and CMO, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with a $208.29 target price. The company exceeded Q4 earnings estimates, raised its quarterly dividend to $0.445, and is currently trading near $224.13.

feed.title: Kentucky American Water completes Livingston water system acquisition By Investing.com
feed.summary: Kentucky American Water has completed the acquisition of the Livingston Municipal Water Works system, serving approximately 162 customer connections in Rockcastle County. The company plans to invest over $600,000 in improvements and began providing service on April 15, 2026. This move integrates the system into existing operations, with customers maintaining current rates and gaining access to online account management and assistance programs.

feed.title: PepsiCo Q1 Preview: Food Changes May Please Robert Kennedy Jr. — Will Shareholders Rejoice Too?
feed.summary: PepsiCo is set to announce its Q1 earnings, with analysts expecting revenue of $18.93 billion and EPS of $1.55. The company is undergoing significant changes in its food businesses, including a focus on Quaker products, alternative cooking methods for chips, and price reductions on some snack brands, which may align with calls from Robert F. Kennedy Jr. for healthier food options. Despite potential impacts from Middle East tensions, experts are watching if volume stabilization and management's guidance on inflation will lead to continued shareholder satisfaction.

feed.title: Costco boosts its cash payout as annual dividend reaches $5.88
feed.summary: Costco Wholesale Corporation announced an increase in its quarterly cash dividend to $1.47 per share, an annualized rate of $5.88, up from the previous $1.30 per share. The dividend is payable on May 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 1, 2026. Costco operates 928 warehouses globally and maintains e-commerce sites in several countries.

feed.title: Las Vegas Sands investors get first-quarter results and call on April 22
feed.summary: Las Vegas Sands (NYSE: LVS) is set to release its first-quarter 2026 financial results after market close on Wednesday, April 22, 2026. The company will host a conference call and webcast at approximately 1:30 p.m. Pacific Time to discuss the results, which investors can access via www.investor.sands.com. Historically, similar earnings-date announcements have led to modest stock movements, with investor focus typically shifting to the actual financial figures and company commentary.

feed.title: IQVIA will post quarterly results before the bell on May 5
feed.summary: IQVIA Holdings Inc. (NYSE: IQV) is scheduled to announce its first-quarter 2026 financial results before the market opens on Tuesday, May 5, 2026. The company will also host a conference call and webcast at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day to discuss the results. Interested parties can find the earnings release and webcast details on IQVIA's Investor Relations website.

feed.title: Texas Pacific Land gives investors two dates to watch in early May
feed.summary: Texas Pacific Land Corporation (NYSE: TPL) announced it will release its first quarter 2026 financial results after the market closes on Wednesday, May 6, 2026. Following the earnings release, the company will host a conference call on Thursday, May 7, 2026, at 10:30 a.m. Eastern Time to discuss the results. Investors can access the webcast on the company's website or participate via telephone.

feed.title: This chemical pump now handles 160°C fluids without seals
feed.summary: Mouvex, a Dover company, has upgraded its G-FLO Series eccentric disc pumps to handle fluids up to 160°C (320°F), making them suitable for high-temperature chemical applications like PVC additives and resins. The seal-less pumps maintain high operational efficiency, supporting viscosities up to 10,000 cP and solids up to 20 mm, while complying with international standards. This enhancement expands the pump's versatility and ensures product containment and operational safety in demanding environments.

feed.title: Weaker flu season weighs on QuidelOrtho as Q1 sales fall below $620M
feed.summary: QuidelOrtho announced preliminary unaudited Q1 2026 revenue of $615-$620 million, attributing the lower figures to a weaker respiratory season, slower China distributor sales, and delayed EMEA orders due to ongoing conflicts. Despite an expected negative free cash flow for Q1 2026, the company maintains that the low end of its full-year 2026 financial guidance is still achievable. Full financial results for Q1 2026 are scheduled for release on May 5, 2026.

feed.title: Is American Express (AXP) Using AI-Powered Agent Protections to Reinforce Its Premium Moat?
feed.summary: American Express has launched new AI-agent-led commerce tools, including the Amex Agentic Commerce Experiences Developer Kit and Amex Agent Purchase Protection, to extend its security and purchase protections to AI-initiated transactions. This move aims to embed American Express's brand, rewards, and security directly into machine-driven spending, reinforcing its premium market position and future-proofing against alternative payment platforms. While this can support growth, investors should consider potential challenges like rising rewards costs and increased competition.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (PPG) PPG Industries Inc. Posts Q1 Adjusted EPS $1.83 per Share, vs. FactSet Est of $1.70
feed.summary: PPG Industries Inc. reported Q1 adjusted EPS of $1.83 per share, surpassing FactSet's estimate of $1.70. This financial update indicates a better-than-expected performance for the company. The article also mentions that PPG Industries has raised prices across its portfolio and will release full Q1 2026 earnings on April 28.

feed.title: JB Hunt: Q1 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: JB Hunt Transport Services Inc. (JBHT) reported first-quarter net income of $141.6 million, or $1.49 per share, surpassing Wall Street's expectations. The company also beat revenue forecasts, posting $3.06 billion for the period. These results were generated using data from Zacks Investment Research.

feed.title: Agilent Technologies Inc stock (US00846U1016): Why its life sciences leadership matters more now for investors
feed.summary: Agilent Technologies Inc. (US00846U1016) is highlighted as a resilient investment in the life sciences sector, providing essential analytical tools and services for drug discovery, clinical testing, and environmental monitoring. The article details its three key revenue segments—Life Sciences and Applied Markets, Diagnostics and Genomics, and Agilent CrossLab—emphasizing the high-margin, recurring revenue from its services arm. Agilent's strong financial health, consistent free cash flow, and exposure to megatrends like aging populations and precision medicine position it for steady growth despite market volatility.

feed.title: Granite REIT stock (CA3969061026): Is its U.S. industrial focus strong enough to unlock new upside?
feed.summary: Granite REIT, a Canadian real estate investment trust, benefits from rising industrial real estate demand due to supply chain shifts and e-commerce growth. The company's portfolio of logistics properties in North America, with a strong focus on investment-grade tenants and key U.S. markets, positions it for steady income and reliable dividends. Despite potential risks from interest rate sensitivity and competition, analysts view its conservative balance sheet and industrial focus favorably as a defensive pick.

feed.title: Paint and coatings prices are rising as PPG lifts rates up to 20%
feed.summary: PPG (NYSE: PPG) has announced a global price adjustment of up to 20% across its paints, coatings, and specialty products portfolio. This increase is a response to significant volatility and supply constraints in global petrochemical, energy, and transportation markets, leading to higher costs for raw materials, energy, logistics, and packaging. The company aims to ensure continuity of supply and service for customers during these dynamic market conditions.

feed.title: Western Midstream stock (US9502201064): Why its midstream stability matters more now for energy investors
feed.summary: Western Midstream Partners (NYSE: WES) is a key player in the U.S. midstream energy sector, offering stability through fee-based contracts despite energy market volatility. The company's extensive infrastructure across major basins, backed by investment-grade agreements, ensures reliable cash flows and consistent distribution growth for investors. Its focus on capital discipline, high distribution yield, and strategic partnerships position it as an attractive option for income-focused portfolios.

feed.title: J.B. Hunt Transport Services, Inc. Reports U.S. GAAP Revenues, Net Earnings and Earnings Per Share for the First Quarter 2026
feed.summary: J.B. Hunt Transport Services, Inc. announced strong first-quarter 2026 results with diluted earnings per share of $1.49, up 27% year-over-year, and total operating revenue of $3.06 billion, a 5% increase. The company saw growth across its Intermodal, Truckload, and Integrated Capacity Solutions segments, driven by increased load volumes and improved productivity, despite facing challenging weather conditions. Operating income rose 16% to $207.0 million, reflecting effective cost management and strategic investments.

feed.title: Valero Energy Corp stock (US91913Y1001): Why does its refining edge matter more now for U.S. investo
feed.summary: Valero Energy Corp (US91913Y1001) is highlighted for its strong competitive position in the refining sector, particularly its ability to process cheaper, heavier crudes efficiently and generate robust cash flows from downstream operations. The company's strategic focus on the U.S. Gulf Coast, diversification into renewable diesel, and disciplined capital allocation are key advantages for investors seeking stability amidst energy market volatility. Analysts view Valero favorably due to its refining efficiency, a strong balance sheet, and a commitment to shareholder returns through buybacks and dividends, while acknowledging risks like crude price volatility and regulatory shifts.

feed.title: J.B. Hunt Transport Services (JBHT) Tops Q1 EPS by 4c, Beats on Revenue
feed.summary: J.B. Hunt Transport Services (NASDAQ: JBHT) reported strong first-quarter results, exceeding analyst expectations for both earnings per share and revenue. The company posted Q1 EPS of $1.49, beating the estimate of $1.45, and revenue of $3.06 billion, surpassing the consensus of $2.95 billion. This performance indicates a positive financial start to the year for J.B. Hunt.

feed.title: Cummins Inc stock (US2310211063): Why its engine dominance in power generation matters more now for investors
feed.summary: Cummins Inc. (CMI) is positioned for steady demand due to its leadership in diesel and alternative engines, critical for reliable backup power amidst global energy shifts and grid instability. The company benefits from diversification, serving various industrial sectors, and investing in zero-emission solutions while maintaining strong cash flows from its core engine and power systems businesses. Investors are drawn to its resilient financial performance, attractive dividend yield, and strategic focus on both traditional and emerging power technologies.

feed.title: Wells Fargo announces more layoffs at Jordan Creek in West Des Moines
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has announced another round of layoffs at its Jordan Creek office campus in West Des Moines, affecting 25 workers, effective June 13. This follows a previous announcement two weeks prior impacting 62 workers. The information was posted on the state's WARN site.

feed.title: Kentucky American Water Completes Acquisition of City of Livingston Municipal Water Works System
feed.summary: Kentucky American Water has completed the acquisition of the Livingston Municipal Water Works system, serving approximately 162 customer connections. The company plans to invest over $600,000 in improvements to the system over the next five years, integrating it into its existing Rockcastle County operations. New customers will maintain current rates and gain access to Kentucky American Water's customer service benefits, including online account management and the H2O Help to Others program.

feed.title: J.B. Hunt Transport Services, Inc. Reports U.S. GAAP Revenues, Net Earnings and Earnings Per Share for the First Quarter 2026
feed.summary: J.B. Hunt Transport Services, Inc. reported strong first-quarter 2026 financial results, with U.S. GAAP net earnings of $141.6 million, or $1.49 per diluted share, an increase of 27% compared to the prior year. Total operating revenue grew by 5% to $3.06 billion, driven by increased load volumes and improved productivity across its Intermodal, Truckload, and Integrated Capacity Solutions segments. The company highlighted operational excellence despite challenging weather and a focus on long-term value for shareholders through investments in people, technology, and capacity.

feed.title: 162 Livingston customers shift to Kentucky American Water with $600,000 upgrade plan
feed.summary: Kentucky American Water has completed the acquisition of the City of Livingston Municipal Water Works system, effective April 15, 2026. This acquisition adds approximately 162 customer connections, and the company plans to invest over $600,000 in system improvements over the next five years. The Kentucky Public Service Commission approved the acquisition, and while the company will adopt existing Livingston rates, it aims to strengthen water infrastructure and enhance service for new customers.

feed.title: Riley Permian sets May payout, first-quarter results due May 6
feed.summary: Riley Permian (NYSE American: REPX) announced a cash dividend of $0.40 per share, payable on May 13, 2026, to shareholders of record as of April 29, 2026. The company also scheduled the release of its first-quarter 2026 financial and operating results for May 6, 2026, after market close, followed by a conference call for investors and analysts on May 7, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. CT. An updated presentation will be available on the company's website prior to the call.

feed.title: Starbucks investors get $0.62 a share as May 29 payout is set
feed.summary: Starbucks Corporation announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.62 per share of outstanding Common Stock. The dividend is scheduled to be paid on May 29, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 15, 2026. The announcement highlights Starbucks' commitment to returning value to its shareholders.

feed.title: Why Blackstone (BX) Stock Is Trading Up Today
feed.summary: Shares of Blackstone (NYSE:BX) rose 3.3% after major banks and asset managers, including BlackRock, Bank of America, and Morgan Stanley, reported better-than-expected first-quarter earnings driven by a rebound in investment banking and robust trading activity. This positive industry news provided a tailwind for the alternative investment manager. The stock also benefited from recent analyst sentiment improvements and plans for a new digital infrastructure investment platform.

feed.title: Ribbon will post first-quarter results after market close on April 28
feed.summary: Ribbon Communications (Nasdaq: RBBN) announced it will report its first-quarter 2026 financial results after market close on Tuesday, April 28, 2026. A conference call with the financial community is scheduled for 4:30 p.m. ET on the same day, with details for webcast and dial-in provided. Historically, similar announcements have led to a positive next-day stock movement for RBBN.

feed.title: PAYPAL HOLDINGS DEADLINE MONDAY: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. Urges PayPal Holdings, Inc. ...
feed.summary: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. has filed a class action lawsuit against PayPal Holdings, Inc. on behalf of investors who purchased shares between February 8, 2024, and February 2, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that PayPal made misleading statements about its revenue outlook and growth plans, and minimized risks from seasonal and macroeconomic fluctuations. Investors have until April 20, 2026, to apply to be lead plaintiff in the case.

feed.title: Live Nation Monopolized Ticket Sales, Jury Says. The Stock Is Sinking.
feed.summary: A Manhattan jury found Live Nation Entertainment and its subsidiary Ticketmaster guilty of monopolizing ticket sales for major live entertainment events. Following this verdict, Live Nation's shares experienced a decline on Wednesday afternoon. The decision suggests potential implications for the company's control over the ticketing market.

feed.title: Amazon.com to Webcast First Quarter 2026 Financial Results Conference Call
feed.summary: Amazon.com, Inc. announced it will host a conference call on Wednesday, April 29, 2026, to discuss its first quarter 2026 financial results. The event is scheduled for 2:30 p.m. PT/5:30 p.m. ET and will be webcast live with audio and slides available for three months on its investor relations website.
